features.name: hier_block module with non_primary IO input
features.description: Code should include a module marked with /*verilator hier_block*/ attribute that has an input port driven by a non-top-level signal from a parent module

features.name: hierarchical signal passing to child module
features.description: Code should include a parent module that passes a non-top-level internal signal to a child hierarchical block module

features.name: xor assignment with clock cast in hier_block
features.description: Code should include an XOR assignment with a clock cast to byte in a hier_block module where the clock is a primary IO

features.name: xor assignment with non_primary_io input in hier_block
features.description: Code should include an XOR assignment using a non-primary IO input signal in a hier_block module, to test whether ICO replication is needed
